subcodes.first_line: The dust of hypocrisy hath enveloped the Luminary of the horizons, and the sorrows of the world have transformed joy into perturbation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ع ل غبار نفاق نیر آفاق را احاطه نموده و احزان عالم سرور را منقلب کرده این
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort, @eulogies; reminiscences, @justice and wrath of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
